statement: Example meaningful events — Candidate future events include view_switched, island_opened, task_editor_opened, file_preview_opened, template_imported, ready_validation_failed, manual_save_clicked, json_backup_exported. — Analytics event map, future behavior adapter.
affected_modules: src/hooks/usePreferences.ts; local storage preference helpers; session restore; analytics/event adapter
ux_impact: Future UX improvements can be based on real
